translated: Le joueur a l'éthos luddique Adepte de la Voie

option_line: dev_gotCottonBookSet:Brother Cotton gave player his Book of Ludd (and met, and had tea)
original: Brother Cotton gave player his Book of Ludd (and met, and had tea)
translated: Frère Cotton a donné au joueur son Livre de Ludd (et rencontré, et pris le thé)
